title: James Simpson
compiled_truth: James Simpson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-16 to 2002-01-18), James Simpson sent 14 and received 154 emails, totalling 168 interactions. Top correspondents: [Phillip Love](people/phillip-love) (7), [Kevin Radous](people/kevin-radous) (7), [Bob Bowen](people/bob-bowen) (7), [Richard Tomaski](people/richard-tomaski) (5), [Hunter Shively](people/hunter-shively) (4).
